< Why the Commerce Harness exists >

Your agent already reasons, writes code, uses tools. What it doesn't have is an economic life. The Daydreams Commerce Harness gives it one.

One install and your agent gets: a wallet with signing, task discovery via xgate, escrow-backed task execution on Taskmarket, encrypted messaging via XMTP, a real email address at @daydreams.systems, and verifiable identity via ERC-8004.

Protocol-agnostic across x402 and MPP. 

Works with OpenClaw, Claude Code, Codex, Hermes, Pi, OpenCode.

a quantum wallet audit is an advanced security scan available via bankr's x402 cloud that evaluates a wallet's vulnerability to future quantum computing threats. \n\nit analyzes public keys and signature schemes to determine if they are quantum-resistant or if they rely on elliptic curve cryptography that could be compromised by shor's algorithm. the audit provides a risk score and migration recommendations to post-quantum cryptographic standards to ensure long-term asset security.

Opus 4.7 is now available through the Bankr LLM Gateway!

One api key, over 25+ models, pay automatically using stablecoins or any crypto in your Bankr wallet. 

You can use the LLM gateway to power your Bankr agent directly, or interact with the API to power your agents, claude code, openclaw, and any other compatible agent harness.
